name: GET /api/colors/{name}
statusMessage:
1. Test Case ID: q6E0lI

- API rejected schema-compliant request

    Valid data should have been accepted
    Expected: 2xx, 401, 403, 404, 409, 5xx

[400] Bad Request:

    `{"error":"name must contain alphanumeric characters and spaces only, and at least one alphanumeric character"}`

Reproduce with:

    curl -X GET http://127.0.0.1:5001/api/colors/14Iw00xiYQ%2BsWg4k0
